message:
fix(pages): Change deploy progress callback from Fn to FnMut

The deploy method's progress callback was declared as Fn but callers
need to borrow term mutably for writeln!. Change to FnMut to allow
mutable borrows in the closure.

Also applies rustfmt formatting to wizard.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
